OncotreePrimaryDisease: Small Cell Neuroendocrine Carcinoma of the Cervix
OncotreeSubtype: Small Cell Neuroendocrine Carcinoma of the Cervix
FormulationID: DMEM:F12 + 0.5% BSA + 2mM Glutamine + 10mM HEPES + 500uM sodium pyruvate + 20ug/ml Insulin + 10ug/ml Transferrin + 25nM Sodium Selenite + 50nM Hydrocortisone + 1ng/ml EGF + 10uM Ethanolamine + 10uM Phosphorylethanolamine + 100pM Triiodo-L-Thyronine
PublicComments: Possibly misidentified. This line was originally though to be SCLC but has been reclassified as a Small Cell Neuroendocrine Carcinoma of the Cervix based on evidence from PMID: 38180245
SNP fingerprinting confirms that this line is a ME-180 derivative. DepMap metadata has been updated (as of 22Q2) to reflect this.
This line is a HeLa derivative (ICLAC). DepMap metadata has been updated (as of 22Q2) to reflect this.
